stimulus: Mitochondria are organelles that are part of a cell's energy production system. These organelles help generate the chemical energy a cell uses to power its functions. ______blank they help regulate signaling pathways that determine when a cell should grow or die.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. "Additionally" logically signals that mitochondria's role in regulating signaling pathways is an additional function of these organelles that is separate from the function of generating chemical energy.

Choice B is incorrect because "previously" illogically signals a chronological sequence. Instead, regulating signaling pathways is an additional function of mitochondria. Choice C is incorrect because "in conclusion" illogically signals that this sentence summarizes the previous information. Instead, this is one of two distinct functions of mitochondria. Choice D is incorrect because "instead" illogically signals that this activity happens in place of generating energy. Rather, regulating signaling is an additional function.
